account.reloginTitle: Your Microsoft session expired - sign in again
account.cookiesResetToast: Microsoft sign-in reset - next sign-in starts fresh
account.clearCookiesTitle: Clears the cached Microsoft web session so you can sign into a different account
account.noAccounts: No accounts yet. Sign in with Microsoft to play online, or add an offline account below.
account.offlineHint: For single-player and offline-mode servers. Can't join online (premium) servers.

instances.title: Instances
instances.emptyFolder: Empty - drag a card in here, or assign one from the ⋮ menu on a card.

onboarding.welcomeBody: A fast, modern Minecraft launcher with modpacks, skins, worlds and more. Let's take a minute to set things up the way you like.
onboarding.themeBody: Pick a theme and accent colour. Changes apply instantly - watch the launcher update as you choose.
onboarding.importBody: Brassworks can import instances from Prism Launcher and the Modrinth App - mods, configs and worlds come along (Prism groups become folders).
onboarding.importLater: No rush - you can always import later from the “+ Add instance” menu.
onboarding.featuredBody: Featured packs and servers add a curated server to your list plus live player counts and news on the Play screen. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.featuredToggleDesc: Featured packs, the featured server, player counts and news.
onboarding.ramBody: This is the default RAM new instances get. Modded packs want more; vanilla is happy with less. You can fine-tune per instance later.
onboarding.rpcBody: Show what you're playing in your Discord status. Purely cosmetic - flip it off if you'd rather keep it private.
onboarding.rpcToggleDesc: Display your current modpack in Discord.
onboarding.languageBody: Brassworks now speaks several languages, with more on the way. You can help translate it too.
onboarding.signInBody: Sign in with Microsoft to play online and use skins, or add an offline account for single-player.
onboarding.signInLater: You can skip this and sign in later from the account menu.
onboarding.doneBody: That's it - you're ready to play. You can revisit everything here from Settings whenever you like. Have fun!

tabIntro.onceNote: A quick intro - you'll only see this once.
tabIntro.instances1Body: Each modpack or version is its own instance with separate mods, worlds and settings.
tabIntro.instances2Body: Drag instances into colour-coded folders, pin favourites, and switch to compact mode.
tabIntro.instances3Body: Create custom instances or install from Modrinth, CurseForge, packwiz, or other launchers.
tabIntro.play1Body: Hit Play to launch. The selected instance shows here with its status and live progress.
tabIntro.play2Body: Pin handy settings - RAM, branch, flavors - to the right-side card for one-click tweaks.
tabIntro.content1Body: Browse and install content from Modrinth and CurseForge straight into this instance.
tabIntro.content2Body: Modpack-managed content is locked so updates stay clean - unlock it to add your own.
tabIntro.worlds1Body: See every world in this instance with its seed and last-played time.
tabIntro.worlds2Body: Jump straight into a world - Brassworks launches the game right to it.
tabIntro.servers1Body: Manage servers, reorder favourites, and join with one click - whole rows are clickable.
tabIntro.screenshots1Body: Browse, open and manage the screenshots taken in this instance.
tabIntro.skin1Body: Each preset bundles a skin, model and cape. Selecting one applies it to your account - the selected preset is what you wear in-game.
tabIntro.skin2Body: Built-in presets are starting points. Hover a preset and hit Duplicate to get an editable copy you can freely change.
tabIntro.skin3Body: Open the Edit (pencil) button on a preset to rename it, swap the skin PNG, switch classic/slim, or pick a cape - then save and select it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: These are launcher-wide defaults. Per-instance overrides live on each instance's gear (Instances → ⚙).

language.title: Language
language.hint: English is the default and the fallback for anything not yet translated.
language.pseudoDesc: Replace translated text with x's so any untranslated UI stands out. For testing.

replay.title: Replay the welcome tour
replay.desc: Replay the first-launch setup and the per-tab intro cards.

resetAll.title: Reset all launcher settings
resetAll.desc: Restores every launcher setting to its default. Your instances, folders and accounts are untouched.
resetAll.tooltip: Reset all launcher settings to defaults

memory.title: Default memory
memory.note: New instances inherit these. Override memory per instance on its gear.

window.title: Default game window
window.sizeHint: The size Minecraft opens at by default.

commands.title: Commands
commands.preHint: Runs in a shell before the game starts.
commands.postHint: Runs in a shell after the game closes.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeHint: “Match system” follows your OS light/dark setting. “Grey” is the default soft dark; “OLED” is true black.
appearance.accentHint: Recolours buttons, sliders and highlights across the app and every theme.
appearance.highContrastDesc: Stronger borders and brighter text on top of your theme.
appearance.closeTrayDesc: Keep running in the system tray when you close the window.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.rpcDesc: Show what you're doing in your Discord status.

featured.title: Featured content
featured.toggleDesc: Show featured packs in the Instances tab, featured servers in server lists, and the live player count and news tiles on the Play screen. Turn off for a clean, self-curated launcher.

curseforge.title: CurseForge
curseforge.keyHint: Browsing works out of the box. Set your own key only if you'd rather not use the bundled one.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.parallelHint: How many files are fetched / verified at once when installing or updating a modpack. Higher is faster; lower is gentler on slow connections. Pick Sequential to disable.

cache.title: Cache
cache.desc: Modrinth & CurseForge data the launcher re-downloads as needed. Safe to clear.

updates.title: Updates
updates.autoDesc: Check for and install launcher updates on startup.

java.whichHint: Automatic downloads and caches the exact version each instance needs. Override this per instance on its gear.
java.none: None yet - the right runtime downloads automatically on first launch.
java.temurin: Temurin (Adoptium) JREs. The correct version also downloads automatically per instance.

instanceSettings.subtitle: Instance settings - overrides apply only to this instance.
instanceSettings.featuredNameLocked: Featured pack names can't be changed
instanceSettings.featuredNameLockedHint: Featured pack names can't be changed.

details.title: Details
details.name: Name
details.notesPlaceholder: Personal notes about this instance - mods to try, server rules, whatever you like…

export.title: Export modpack
export.desc: Bundle this instance's added content into a shareable modpack file (saved to your Downloads folder).

version.title: Version & loader
version.modLoaderHint: Switch loaders or make a vanilla instance modded. Re-installs on next launch.
version.modsNote: Existing mods may need to be updated for the new version or loader.
version.updatedToast: Version updated - it installs on next launch

quick.title: Quick settings
quick.desc: Pin settings to this instance's Play screen for one-click access from the quick-settings card.

java.title: Java
java.forThisHint: “Launcher default” uses your global policy. Auto downloads the exact version this build needs.

jvm.title: JVM arguments
jvm.presetHint: Pick tuned flags or Custom to edit them.

window.title: Game window
window.resHint: Leave blank to use the launcher default.

commands.title: Commands
commands.preHint: Overrides the launcher default for this instance.

branding.title: Branding
branding.iconUrlHint: Square logo shown on the card and Play page.
branding.bannerUrlHint: Wide image shown behind the Play hero.
branding.logoUrlHint: Hero logo shown centered above the Play button. Any aspect ratio.

modpack.title: Modpack
modpack.sourceFixedFeatured: The source is fixed for featured packs.
modpack.unlockToSwitch: Unlock the modpack to switch branches.
modpack.noBranches: No other branches with a pack.toml were found.
modpack.noFlavors: This pack has no unsup flavor groups to change.
modpack.lockDesc: Locked packs verify/update on launch and protect their mods. Unlock to override the game + loader version.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.desc: Permanently delete this instance and all its game files.

mods.title: Content
mods.lockedTitle: Lock to restore managed modpack content and auto-updates
mods.unlockTitle: Unlock to disable / re-version modpack content (pauses auto-updates)
mods.updateAllTitle: Update all your added mods to their latest compatible version (modpack-locked mods are untouched)
mods.emptyInstall: Nothing installed yet - press Play to install the modpack.
mods.unlockBody1: Unlocking lets you disable and change modpack mods, and
mods.unlockBody2: . This may break your modpack and
mods.unlockBody3: . Lock it again to restore the modpack and updates.
mods.updatePickDesc: Pick which of your added mods to update to the latest compatible version. Modpack-managed mods are never touched.
mods.managedLocked: Part of the modpack - managed automatically
mods.upToDate: Everything is already up to date

worlds.title: Worlds
worlds.emptyNone: No worlds yet - create one in-game and it'll show up here.
worlds.deleteBody2: from this instance. This cannot be undone.
worlds.noBackups: No backups yet - use “Back up now” on a world.

servers.title: Servers
servers.emptyNone: No servers saved - add one to get started.

addInstance.name: Name
addInstance.pwDesc3: to pick a branch. The launcher detects the loader + Minecraft version and syncs on launch.
addInstance.noBranches: No branches with a pack.toml found in that repo.
addInstance.unsupDesc2: flavor groups and verify its signature. For packs built with
addInstance.unsupWiki: What is unsup? Read the wiki →
addInstance.packwizWiki: What is packwiz? Read the wiki →
addInstance.importDesc: Instances found in Prism Launcher and the Modrinth App. Importing copies their mods, configs, and worlds into a new Brassworks instance (Prism groups become folders).
addInstance.noImports: No Prism Launcher or Modrinth App instances found.

play.updateLockHint: Update available - lock the modpack to install it.
play.signInToPlay: Sign in with Microsoft to start playing.
play.filesFailed: {count} files couldn't download - they'll retry on next launch.
play.pinHint: Pin settings here for one-click access. Click to choose.

quickSettings.title: Quick settings
quickSettings.pickerDesc: Pick the settings to show on this instance's Play screen.
quickSettings.noFlavorGroups: This pack has no flavor groups.

skin.title: Skin selector
skin.signInPrompt: Sign in with a Microsoft account to manage skins & capes.
skin.selectedHint: This skin is selected - saving applies it.
skin.presetHint: Saves the preset - use a card's Apply button to wear it.

commands.switchTheme: Switch theme (system / grey / OLED / ocean / mocha / light)

changelog.updatedBanner: Updated successfully to v{version}. Here's what changed:
changelog.errorBody1: Couldn't load the changelog right now. You can read it on

restartPrompt.body: Restart the launcher to finish updating.

microsoft.codeMessage: A sign-in window has opened. Finish logging in there - the launcher will pick it up automatically.

commandPalette.searchPlaceholder: Search commands, or type / for actions…

logUpload.title: Log uploaded
logUpload.shareHint: Share this link with the Brassworks team.

logViewer.noLog: No log found for this session yet.

modpackBrowser.featuredDesc1: Brassworks has a native, server-connected experience for
modpackBrowser.featuredDesc2: - preset server, news and the right defaults, all managed for you.
modpackBrowser.featuredOff: Featured content is currently turned off.

versionPicker.loaderUnavailable: {loader} has no build for Minecraft {mc}. Pick a different version or loader.

datapacks.noResults: No datapacks found - try a different search.
datapacks.empty: No datapacks in this world yet.

addContent.noResults: No results - try a different search.
addContent.compatNote: Only versions compatible with Minecraft {mc}{loader} are shown.
addContent.unlockTitle: Unlock the modpack to add or change content
addContent.managedUnlock: Managed by the modpack - unlock it to add content
addContent.managedLocked: Managed by the modpack. Unlock it on the Content page to change.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.empty: No screenshots yet - press F2 in‑game to take one.
screenshots.openTitle: Open in your default photo app

ui.allowHighMemDesc: Raise the cap to 64 GB for high-RAM machines.
